targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (1.0 - CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_type='delivery_failed') AS REAL) / MAX(1, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_type='message_routed'))), 1) as value;

targets.queryText: SELECT json_extract(payload, '$.from') || ' -> ' || json_extract(payload, '$.to') as route, COUNT(*) as count FROM events WHERE event_type='message_routed' GROUP BY route ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Average Cycle and Lead Time Per Hour

panels.title: Agent Spawns vs Crashes Per Hour

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS triggered FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_triggered' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS triggered FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_triggered' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS triggered FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_triggered' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.restart_count') AS INTEGER), 0) AS tasks_created FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='success' ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.restart_count') AS INTEGER), 0) AS tasks_created FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='success' ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.restart_count') AS INTEGER), 0) AS tasks_created FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='success' ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.uptime_secs') AS INTEGER), 0) AS latency_secs FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.uptime_secs') AS INTEGER), 0) AS latency_secs FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.uptime_secs') AS INTEGER), 0) AS latency_secs FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE COALESCE(json_extract(payload, '$.reason'), 'unknown') WHEN 'success' THEN 'success' WHEN 'failure' THEN 'failure' ELSE 'unknown' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY value DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE COALESCE(json_extract(payload, '$.reason'), 'unknown') WHEN 'success' THEN 'success' WHEN 'failure' THEN 'failure' ELSE 'unknown' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY value DESC;
targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE COALESCE(json_extract(payload, '$.reason'), 'unknown') WHEN 'success' THEN 'success' WHEN 'failure' THEN 'failure' ELSE 'unknown' END AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM events WHERE event_type='planning_cycle_completed' GROUP BY metric ORDER BY value DESC;

targets.queryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS detections, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='narration_loop_detected' GROUP BY timestamp, role ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS detections, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='narration_loop_detected' GROUP BY timestamp, role ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS detections, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='narration_loop_detected' GROUP BY timestamp, role ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS restarts FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='agent_restarted' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='narration' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS restarts FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='agent_restarted' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='narration' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS restarts FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='agent_restarted' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='narration' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(n.timestamp - a.timestamp), 1), 0) AS value FROM events n LEFT JOIN events a ON a.role = n.role AND a.task_id = n.task_id AND a.event_type='task_assigned' AND a.timestamp <= n.timestamp WHERE n.event_type='narration_loop_detected';
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(n.timestamp - a.timestamp), 1), 0) AS value FROM events n LEFT JOIN events a ON a.role = n.role AND a.task_id = n.task_id AND a.event_type='task_assigned' AND a.timestamp <= n.timestamp WHERE n.event_type='narration_loop_detected';
targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(n.timestamp - a.timestamp), 1), 0) AS value FROM events n LEFT JOIN events a ON a.role = n.role AND a.task_id = n.task_id AND a.event_type='task_assigned' AND a.timestamp <= n.timestamp WHERE n.event_type='narration_loop_detected';

targets.queryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS warnings, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='context_pressure_warning' GROUP BY timestamp, role ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS warnings, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='context_pressure_warning' GROUP BY timestamp, role ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS warnings, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='context_pressure_warning' GROUP BY timestamp, role ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS restarts FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='agent_restarted' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='context_pressure' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS restarts FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='agent_restarted' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='context_pressure' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS restarts FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='agent_restarted' AND json_extract(payload, '$.reason')='context_pressure' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.load') AS REAL), 0) AS pressure_score, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='context_pressure_warning' ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.load') AS REAL), 0) AS pressure_score, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='context_pressure_warning' ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, COALESCE(CAST(json_extract(payload, '$.load') AS REAL), 0) AS pressure_score, role AS metric FROM events WHERE event_type='context_pressure_warning' ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='task_assigned' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e3 WHERE e3.event_type='task_completed' AND e3.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS in_progress FROM hours ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='task_assigned' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e3 WHERE e3.event_type='task_completed' AND e3.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS in_progress FROM hours ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='task_assigned' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e3 WHERE e3.event_type='task_completed' AND e3.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS in_progress FROM hours ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='task_completed' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e3 WHERE e3.event_type='board_task_archived' AND e3.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS done FROM hours ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='task_completed' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e3 WHERE e3.event_type='board_task_archived' AND e3.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS done FROM hours ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='task_completed' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e3 WHERE e3.event_type='board_task_archived' AND e3.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS done FROM hours ORDER BY time;

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='board_task_archived' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS archived FROM hours ORDER BY time;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='board_task_archived' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS archived FROM hours ORDER BY time;
targets.rawSql: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_type='board_task_archived' AND e2.timestamp <= (h + 1) * 3600) AS archived FROM hours ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Board Task Count by Status Over Time

targets.queryText: WITH stage_metrics AS ( SELECT 'in_progress' AS stage, AVG(completed_at - started_at) AS avg_secs FROM task_metrics WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'done' AS stage, AVG(a.timestamp - tm.completed_at) AS avg_secs FROM task_metrics tm JOIN events a ON a.task_id = tm.task_id AND a.event_type='board_task_archived' WHERE tm.completed_at IS NOT NULL ) SELECT stage, ROUND(COALESCE(avg_secs, 0), 1) AS value FROM stage_metrics;
targets.rawQueryText: WITH stage_metrics AS ( SELECT 'in_progress' AS stage, AVG(completed_at - started_at) AS avg_secs FROM task_metrics WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'done' AS stage, AVG(a.timestamp - tm.completed_at) AS avg_secs FROM task_metrics tm JOIN events a ON a.task_id = tm.task_id AND a.event_type='board_task_archived' WHERE tm.completed_at IS NOT NULL ) SELECT stage, ROUND(COALESCE(avg_secs, 0), 1) AS value FROM stage_metrics;
targets.rawSql: WITH stage_metrics AS ( SELECT 'in_progress' AS stage, AVG(completed_at - started_at) AS avg_secs FROM task_metrics WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL AND completed_at IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'done' AS stage, AVG(a.timestamp - tm.completed_at) AS avg_secs FROM task_metrics tm JOIN events a ON a.task_id = tm.task_id AND a.event_type='board_task_archived' WHERE tm.completed_at IS NOT NULL ) SELECT stage, ROUND(COALESCE(avg_secs, 0), 1) AS value FROM stage_metrics;

panels.title: Average Time in Status by Lifecycle Stage

targets.queryText: WITH RECURSIVE hours(h) AS ( SELECT COALESCE(MIN(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events UNION ALL SELECT h + 1 FROM hours WHERE h < (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(timestamp) / 3600, strftime('%s', 'now') / 3600) FROM events) ) SELECT h * 3600 AS time, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS archived FROM hours LEFT JOIN (SELECT timestamp / 3600 AS hr, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM events WHERE event_type='board_task_archived' GROUP BY hr) e ON hours.h = e.hr ORDER BY time;
